nodes.name: Webhook Call Handler
nodes.notes: Receives tool invocations from ElevenLabs during live calls. Handles: check_availability, get_schedule_overview, record_outcome.

nodes.name: Switch Tool Name
nodes.notes: Routes requests by tool_name to the proper handler branch.

nodes.name: Code Check Availability
nodes.notes: Filters schedule by doctor_name and/or day_of_week from tool parameters. Returns only free slots.

nodes.name: Code Format Outcome
nodes.notes: Normalizes outcome payload including patient and appointment details for analysis workflow.

nodes.name: Code Schedule Overview
nodes.notes: Returns the list of all doctors, their specialties, and working days.

nodes.name: HTTP Trigger Analysis
nodes.notes: Forwards normalized call payload to analysis webhook workflow.

nodes.name: Respond Availability
nodes.notes: Returns filtered availability JSON back to ElevenLabs tool call.

nodes.name: Respond Record Outcome
nodes.notes: Acknowledges successful record_outcome processing and triggers analysis pipeline.

nodes.name: Respond Schedule Overview
nodes.notes: Returns doctor overview list to ElevenLabs.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { success: false, error: 'Unsupported tool_name', received: $json.tool_name || null } }];
